productDisplayName: Nike Men Stripe Navy Blue Tracksuits
description: CompositionNavy blue track suit comprised of:Navy blue track jacket made of 100% polyester that has dark navy blue mock neck, long dark navy blue raglan sleeves with ribbed cuffs, zippered placket on the front, insert pockets on the sides, green striped panel on the upper chest, embroidered swoosh logo on the upper chest and dark navy blue ribbed hemlineDark navy blue track pant made of 100% polyester that has a wide elasticated waistband, insert pockets on the sides, embroidered swoosh logo on the left leg, welt pocket on the right hip with a Velcro closure and navy blue panel detailing on the side seams FittingComfortWash careMachine was coldWash separately with like coloursDo not use softenersRemove immediatelyDo not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleach, iron or dry cleanLine dryLook on trend while training in this navy blue and dark navy track suit from the Athletic Dept collection of nike. The polyester fabric provides greater comfort and allows you to train longer. The track suit can be worn together or as separates and they are perfect for gym session or for sporting activities. The track jacket can be worn casually as well.
